name: OceanaGold Corp. Reg.Def.Dep.Re
summary: OceanaGold Corporation is a multinational gold producer committed to the highest standards of environmental, social and governance practices, headquartered in Melbourne, Australia. The company operates a portfolio of assets including the Didipio mine in the Philippines, the Macraes and Waihi operations in New Zealand and the Haile Gold Mine in the United States of America. OceanaGold focuses on delivering consistent operational performance and driving profitable organic growth, with a strategy to enhance value for all stakeholders.
